description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on pull request open and synchronize events, and on push to the main branch. Use a matrix job on ubuntu-latest to test multiple Python versions, Pydantic versions, and FastAPI versions. The job checks out the repository, installs uv, syncs dependencies, caches Docker images, prepares databases, runs tests with specific environment variables, and uploads coverage to Codecov using a token from secrets.
